title: dendrorkis cerea
intro: Dendrocalamus giganteus, also known as Dendrocalamus cereus, is a species of giant bamboo found in Southeast Asia and is sometimes referred to as Dendrocalamus cerea or Dendrocalamus giganteus, however, the specific name "Dendrocalamus cerea" is not a widely recognized name in scientific literature. Dendrocalamus giganteus is a type of bamboo. I was unable to verify any medicinal properties of Dendrocalamus cerea.
